name: Palmy
description: '''Eve Pancharoen''' ({{Langx|th|อีฟ ปานเจริญ}}; born 7 August 1981), known professionally as '''Palmy''' ({{Langx|th|ปาล์มมี่}}), is a Thai pop singer who has recorded and released several albums, including concert DVDs on the [[GMM Grammy]] label, beginning with her self-titled solo debut, ''Palmy'', in 2001. She continued on to perform live with T-Bone and has appeared as a guest vocalist at other concerts and music festivals as well. She has performed in several Asian countries, including Japan, South Korea, Singapore, and Thailand, and has also performed in Australia and the United Kingdom.
